mapper.select:
SELECT i.ord_code, i.prod_code, DATE_FORMAT(i.ord_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS ord_date, i.ord_su, i.ord_amnt, i.ord_lot, i.ord_boxsu, i.ord_danw, i.ord_danj, p.prod_name, p.prod_no, p.prod_gyu, p.prod_jai, p.tech_no, p.corp_name FROM tb_ipgo i LEFT JOIN tb_product p ON p.prod_code = i.prod_code WHERE 1=1
AND DATE(i.ord_date) >= #{sdate}
AND DATE(i.ord_date) <= #{edate}
AND p.corp_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{corp_name}, '%')
AND p.prod_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{prod_name}, '%')
AND p.prod_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{prod_no}, '%')
ORDER BY i.ord_date DESC, i.ord_code DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ipgo ( ord_code, prod_code, ord_date, ord_su, ord_amnt, ord_lot, ord_boxsu, ord_danw, ord_danj ) VALUES ( #{ord_code}, #{prod_code}, STR_TO_DATE(#{ord_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{ord_su}, #{ord_amnt}, #{ord_lot}, #{ord_boxsu}, #{ord_danw}, #{ord_danj} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ipgo SET prod_code = #{prod_code}, ord_date = STR_TO_DATE(#{ord_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), ord_su = #{ord_su}, ord_amnt = #{ord_amnt}, ord_lot = #{ord_lot}, ord_boxsu = #{ord_boxsu}, ord_danw = #{ord_danw}, ord_danj = #{ord_danj} WHERE ord_code = #{ord_code}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(ord_code) FROM tb_ipgo WHERE ord_code LIKE CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%y%m%d'), '%')
